notes: Compressed proxy for a real long session: 4 turns with tool calls (Read, Bash, Write). Spec asserts: within each turn state stays working continuously across intermediate tool_use/tool_result pairs (no flicker); per-turn arcs ready→working→ready; session never gets stuck in any state. Per-turn invariant 'no state_transition to ready' inside the working window is the no-flicker regression guard (issue #321 family). Final state is ready.

text: Turn 1 prompt (read CHANGELOG.md) drives ready → working
Turn 1 working span: Read tool call + assistant text — no flicker to ready
Turn 2 working span: Bash tool call + assistant text — no flicker to ready
Turn 3 working span: Write tool call + assistant text — no flicker to ready
Turn 4 prompt (list 3 files) drives ready → working
Turn 4 working span: Read or Bash tool call + assistant text — no flicker to ready
Final turn ends; working → ready. Session reaches ready at end (spec bullet 4).
